allow: PowerShell(if \(Test-Path "D:\\develop\\StreamPipeline\\dev"\) { Get-ChildItem -Path "D:\\develop\\StreamPipeline\\dev" -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { "StreamPipeline/dev not found at D:\\develop\\StreamPipeline\\dev" })
Bash(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries packet=pts_time,dts_time,duration_time -read_intervals "%+20" -of csv=p=0 ark.mp4)
Bash(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries packet=pts_time,duration_time -read_intervals "3600%+10" -of csv=p=0 ark.mp4)
Bash(time ffmpeg -v error -y -ss 3600 -t 300 -i ark.mp4 -c copy -avoid_negative_ts make_zero tmp_verify/slice.mp4)
Bash(ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries packet=pts_time -of csv=p=0 burn_setpts.mp4)
